name: Mound View
headline: Captains Fish and Chicken in Mound View, NE Cedar Rapids
body: Captains Fish and Chicken sits on the 1st Avenue NE corridor in the Mound View area on the northeast side of Cedar Rapids — an easy counter-service stop for fried fish and chicken to go.
localFacts: On the 1st Avenue NE corridor, a main northeast-side arterial
Onsite parking at the 1616 1st Ave NE storefront
proximityTrustLines: A quick stop for northeast-side lunch and dinner pickups along 1st Ave NE.
Call-ahead orders are ready fast for regulars on this side of town.

townFaqs.question: Is there parking at the 1st Ave NE location?
townFaqs.answer: Yes — the storefront at 1616 1st Ave NE has onsite parking, plus street parking along 1st Avenue NE.

townFaqs.question: What part of Cedar Rapids is Captains in?
townFaqs.answer: The northeast side, on the 1st Avenue NE corridor near Hy-Vee.

seo.title: Captains Fish and Chicken — Mound View, NE Cedar Rapids
seo.description: Fried fish and chicken to go on the 1st Avenue NE corridor in northeast Cedar Rapids, near Hy-Vee with onsite parking.
